title_zh: 云端晾晒超现实时尚

prompt: Vertical surreal fashion editorial photograph, human figure that matches the character appearance from reference image suspended by a large shiny silver metal binder clip hooked onto a polished silver metal clothes hanging rod, floating mid-air above fluffy white cumulus clouds and bright clear blue sky. Multiple identical silver metal binder clips hang separate fashion items side by side on the same metal rack, all clothing, footwear, accessories, backpack and hats automatically match the style, color, cut and design of the uploaded reference image. Full body framing of the character, soft natural daylight, commercial streetwear advertising aesthetic, hyperrealistic sharp photography details, glossy reflective metal clip texture, soft fluffy cloud texture, clean vibrant color grading, minimalist cloud-sky empty background, surreal imaginative laundry-hanging suspended composition, 8K ultra HD, high definition, subtle soft shadows, high-end fashion magazine shot. Strictly match the reference image’s lighting tone, color palette, metallic prop texture, cloud background, suspended clip hanging surreal core concept, photographic style and vertical framing automatically.

title_zh: 千禧风多图拼贴人像设计

Decorated with abundant hand-drawn decorative stickers: five-pointed stars, red love hearts, tiny colorful sequin stars, red bows, polka dot music notes, red landline telephone, apple-shaped photo frame, burst line ornaments. Curvy bubble vintage typography with thick red outline, warm yellow textured grainy paper background, soft warm peach color grading, retro 2000s print texture, thin film grain texture, bold saturated red and cream color palette, bottom Korean and English subtitle text strip, commercial kpop graphic design, high detail, 8K ultra HD, clean layered collage composition. Strictly match the reference image’s retro paper texture, warm color palette, sticker decoration style, multi-cutout collage layout, Y2K vintage aesthetic and vertical framing automatically.
